# fly_volume_snapshot (Resource)

Creates a snapshot of a Fly.io volume. Snapshots are immutable. Import using app_name/volume_id/snapshot_id.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "fly_volume_snapshot" "backup" {
  app       = fly_app.example.name
  volume_id = fly_volume.data.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `app` (String) The name of the application. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `volume_id` (String) The ID of the volume to snapshot. Changing this forces a new resource.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when the snapshot was created.
- `digest` (String) The digest of the snapshot.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the snapshot.
- `size` (Number) The size of the snapshot in bytes.
- `status` (String) The status of the snapshot.
